descriptionShort: Transfer of Richmond Sockeyes player Hendry to Fort McMurray Oil Barons; Hendry scores hat-trick in debut game.
descriptionLong: Fort McMurray Oil Barons acquired left-winger Hendry from the Richmond Sockeyes in a trade for Dean Rutledge. Making his debut on January 25, 1987, Hendry scored three goals to lead Fort McMurray to a 7-3 victory over Hobbema Hawks. The Terrace, B.C. native, who had previously attended NHL Hartford Whalers training camp, impressed Oil Barons coach and GM Ivan Prediger with his performance and hockey sense.
